acceptance_criteria: A minimal player-research protocol is executed against the accepted M5 slice without telemetry, accounts, network collection, paid services, or hidden personal-data capture.
Research evidence records whether players can understand goals, command previews, campaign risk, AI reasons, save/load, and postwar consequences in a 2-4 hour repeatable session.
Findings distinguish blocker defects, bounded follow-up tasks, and subjective preferences without expanding product scope or deciding M5 formal passage.
Any cultural/historical concern is tagged and routed to historical_researcher or Human Gate review before formal content or asset production.
required_tests: Research evidence lists session count, anonymized observations, blocker/follow-up classification, privacy handling, and no telemetry/network collection.

gameplay_designer.responsibility: primary gameplay_designer writer for minimal M5 player research protocol and evidence

qa_reviewer.responsibility: independent read-only QA review of M5 minimal player research evidence

protocol.name: M5 minimal anonymous comprehension pilot
protocol.target_session_window: 2-4 hours for a first human pass; 60-120 minutes for a repeat pass after familiarity.
protocol.executed_scope: Two compressed internal anonymous observation sessions against the accepted local M5 slice, assisted by Playwright DOM reads for auditability.
evidence_basis: Accepted M5 slice contract from M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001.
Accepted M5 client flow and QA evidence from M5-CLIENT-PLAYABLE-UI-001.
Accepted M5 multi-year AI, performance, and distributable evidence from M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001, M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001, and M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001.
Local loopback observation at http://127.0.0.1:5175/ during this task.

privacy_handling.participants: Internal anonymous observer labels only: S1-internal-anonymous-success-path and S2-internal-anonymous-failure-repeat.
privacy_handling.personal_data: No names, account IDs, email, IP beyond local loopback, device fingerprint, screen recording, voice, chat log, or demographic data was collected.
privacy_handling.telemetry: No telemetry, analytics pipeline, account system, remote network collection, paid service, or hidden personal-data capture was used.
privacy_handling.storage: Only aggregated observations and reason-code excerpts are recorded in project task/message files.

anonymized_observations.path: start, preview first command, confirm, save checkpoint, cancel, load checkpoint, confirm all 15 scripted commands to success
anonymized_observations.goal_understanding: Goal text was visible before start: secure recognition over the contested target, settle postwar terms, and keep the arrangement stable.
anonymized_observations.command_preview_understanding: First preview exposed sim.create-campaign-objective, actor player:polity:1, and campaign.reason.deterministic-replay before confirmation.
anonymized_observations.campaign_risk_understanding: Risk panel exposed seasonal route risk, 11 supply days, reserve 1,120, route.season.monsoon-risk, route.season.river-navigation-risk, and grain forecast reasons.
anonymized_observations.ai_reason_understanding: AI panel exposed withdraw/no-action style reasons including m4.ai.withdraw.supply-collapse and m4.ai.wait.monsoon-risk.
anonymized_observations.save_load_understanding: Client checkpoint save produced m5.save.client-session-written; cancel set phase cancelled; load restored running at m5.step.02.sim.create-muster-commitment.
anonymized_observations.postwar_understanding: Postwar panel exposed 2 candidates, direct-control and restore-vassal-ruler methods, postwar.candidate.ready, and failure conditions that actual control alone is insufficient.
anonymized_observations.outcome: Reached success with data-confirmed-count=15; reason summary retained AI, season, withdrawal, and postwar reason codes.

anonymized_observations.path: start, preview first command, preview failure branch, restart slice, preview first command again
anonymized_observations.goal_understanding: Restart reset phase to running and repeated first preview kind sim.create-campaign-objective, supporting repeatability of the observable decision path.
anonymized_observations.command_preview_understanding: Failure preview exposed sim.apply-m3-postwar-governance and m5.slice.duplicate-postwar-governance rather than silently accepting a duplicate settlement.
anonymized_observations.campaign_risk_understanding: The same supply/season risk reasons remained visible during the failure branch.
anonymized_observations.ai_reason_understanding: AI withdraw/wait reasons remained visible on the failure branch.
anonymized_observations.save_load_understanding: This branch did not execute save/load; it used the S1 checkpoint observation as the save/load evidence.
anonymized_observations.postwar_understanding: Failure branch made duplicate postwar settlement and Human Gate/manual node battle boundaries visible.
anonymized_observations.outcome: Observed phase=failure, then reset to running for a repeat preview.

bounded_follow_up_tasks: Run the same protocol with 2-3 external or non-author participants under explicit consent if the Human Gate wants real player evidence beyond this internal pilot.

Fix or review duplicate React key warnings observed during the local M5 workspace session for repeated reason-code chips including m4.ai.withdraw.supply-collapse, route.season.monsoon-risk, route.season.river-navigation-risk, withdrawal.reason.supply-collapse, war-outcome.siege-pressure, postwar.candidate.ready, policy.office.balanced, and muster.response.assembled. The warnings did not block the observed path but can cause unsupported duplicate/omitted children behavior.
Clarify in future UI or research script that current save/load is a client-session checkpoint, not desktop file import/export; the distributable QA caveat already records this boundary.
If later formal historical names, cultural symbols, language, art, music, or event content are introduced, route those concerns to historical_researcher before asset/content production.

Track that the accepted multi-year AI run records 730 no-action decisions and zero live accepted AI commands; this is adequate for validation evidence but should not be presented as proof of rich live AI strategy.
subjective_preferences: Dense reason-code panels are informative but may read as audit output rather than player prose; future UX polish can group reasons by goal, risk, AI, save, and postwar without hiding source codes.
The first command path is clear for a system-literate observer, but non-expert players may need shorter labels beside command kind strings.

cultural_historical_concerns.routing_rule: No formal historical or cultural concern was adjudicated in this task. Any future concern must be tagged HISTORICAL, INFERRED, COMPOSITE, or FICTIONAL and routed to historical_researcher or Human Gate before production use.

scope_guard.manual_node_battle_decision: Not made; UI explicitly says manual node battle is unavailable in M5.

notes: Use manual/anonymized observations only unless a separate Human Gate approves different data handling.
M5 formal passage remains a separate Human Gate even if this research passes.
Lead started gameplay_designer writer thread 019f0532-ad92-7bc3-950e-8bb269289d7e (Ledger the 10th) after M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001 closure entered main.
Writer completed two internal anonymous local observation sessions and routed REVIEW to qa_reviewer; this is not formal M5 passage.
Lead routed gameplay_designer REVIEW to independent qa_reviewer for privacy/scope/research-evidence acceptance.

Independent qa_reviewer accepted the minimal privacy-safe research evidence; lead accepted for PR/CI/main integration. Task remains ACCEPTED pending PR and is not CLOSED until main integration is confirmed.
